01.summary: Scaffolded okf-schema package with pyproject.toml, justfile, and all foundational files
01.notes: All acceptance criteria met. Package scaffolding complete: pyproject.toml, justfile, src/okf_schema/__init__.py with dynamic __version__, README, CONTRIBUTING, .editorconfig, .gitignore, tests, and uv.lock all present and correct. Tests pass. ⚠️ Session log verification for 'just preflight' command output was not fully extractable from JSONL artifacts; progress.json attests 'Preflight passes'.

02.summary: Add internal infrastructure: models, yaml helpers, utilities, built-in schema, and 47 unit tests
02.notes: All acceptance criteria met. 6 internal modules created with full type hints and docstrings. 47 unit tests cover all public functions in _internal/ and schemas/. ruamel.yaml round-trip preserves quotes and comments. Link resolution correctly handles external URLs (https://, mailto:), relative paths, and absolute bundle-relative paths. Built-in schema validates type as non-empty string via jsonschema. Coverage: 97.55% (exceeds 95% minimum). No placeholders, TODOs, or security issues. Quality gate verified via independent test execution (session logs not fully extractable but commit message and runtime verification confirm passing state).

03.summary: Implement bundle validator with E1-E6 and W1-W6 rules, 57 tests, 96% coverage
03.notes: All acceptance criteria met. All validation rules E1-E6 and W1-W6 implemented in validator.py. 57 unit tests cover every error/warning code plus edge cases (empty bundle, non-directory, external links, missing schema DB). Schema database loading supports both .schema.json and .schema.yaml. Quality gate (just preflight) passes: 105 tests, 96.24% coverage (exceeds 95% minimum). No placeholders, TODOs, or security issues. Code is clean, typed, and documented.

04.summary: Implement frontmatter formatter with list flattening, check/diff modes, and 28 tests
04.notes: All acceptance criteria met. Implementation includes: flatten_value (recursive list flattening), format_frontmatter (round-trip via ruamel.yaml), format_file (in-place/check/diff modes), format_bundle (batch processing with FormattedResult). 28 unit tests cover flattening, comment preservation, check/diff/in-place modes, no-frontmatter skipping, idempotency, and bundle traversal. Style-check, lint, typecheck (ty + mypy), and test all pass. Project coverage: 96.60% (exceeds 95% minimum). ⚠️ Session log verification for 'just preflight' command output was not fully extractable from JSONL artifacts; progress.json attests task completion and independent verification confirms quality gate passes. Minor observation: test_preserves_comments only validates the no-op (already-flat) case; comment preservation during actual flattening was verified manually and works correctly.

05.summary: Implement public Python API with 8 functions, 59 tests, 96% coverage
05.notes: All 8 public API functions implemented with type hints and docstrings. validate_bundle delegates to validator.py and returns Report. search_bundle performs case-insensitive substring search across title/description/type/tags frontmatter fields. graph_bundle returns correct adjacency list filtering external/out-of-bundle/self links. stats_bundle computes all metrics (files, concepts, frontmatter-less, size, links, broken links, type/tag distributions, directories). index_bundle regenerates index.md files preserving root frontmatter and existing descriptions. 59 tests in tests/test_api.py, all passing. Overall coverage 96.15% (exceeds 95% minimum). just preflight passes (192 tests total). No placeholders, TODOs, or security issues. ⚠️ Quality gate verified via independent execution; session log artifacts not fully extractable.

06.summary: Add CLI entry point with init, new, validate, format subcommands and 22 tests
06.notes: All acceptance criteria met. CLI group with global --version, --verbose, --quiet options implemented. Four subcommands (init, new, validate, format) all functional with correct exit codes. 22 CLI tests cover all subcommands, edge cases, and error conditions. Coverage: 95.21% (exceeds 95% minimum). Quality gate (just preflight) passes with 214 tests. No security issues, placeholders, or TODOs.

07.summary: Add list, show, index, search, graph, stats CLI subcommands with full test coverage
07.notes: All 6 CLI subcommands (list, show, index, search, graph, stats) implemented correctly. 29 tests in test_cli_remaining.py covering all subcommands, error handling, and _bar helper. Full suite: 243 passed, 95.58% coverage (exceeds 95% min). No placeholders, TODOs, or security issues.

08.summary: Add integration tests and edge-case coverage reaching 96.43% coverage
08.notes: All acceptance criteria met: conftest.py with 5 fixtures, test_integration.py with 10 end-to-end tests, test_edge_cases.py with 41 edge-case tests across 10 classes. Coverage: 96.43% (exceeds 95% minimum). 298 tests pass. Quality gate (just preflight) passes. No placeholders, no dead code, no security issues.

09.notes: publish.yml references ci.yml as reusable workflow but ci.yml lacks workflow_call trigger. GitHub Actions will fail on release. Add workflow_call to ci.yml on: section.

09.summary: Sphinx docs, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and Compendium SKILL.md
09.notes: All acceptance criteria met. Delta pass: workflow_call trigger added to ci.yml (Round 1 feedback resolved). Full pass: all 9 criteria verified — Sphinx docs build without warnings, API/CLI references complete, CI runs on all required Python versions and platforms, publish.yml uses OIDC trusted publishing, SKILL.md follows Compendium format with all validation rules and subcommands. Quality gate (just preflight) passes: 298 tests, 96.43% coverage. No security issues.

phase-3.summary: Phase 3 complete: API + 10 CLI subcommands, 243 tests, 95.58% coverage, zero rework
commits: f7d59ef feat(api): add public Python API for OKF bundle operations
